key: This is the company name that identifies the business or the activity and that will be visible to the general public. The company will remain the legal entity on all documents but you can enter the relevant trading name for quotations, deliveries, invoices, etc., and display a different logo. In the Configurations tab of your company form, you can enter certain information about your company trading names.
message: This is the company name that identifies the business or the activity and that will be visible to the general public. The company will remain the legal entity on all documents but you can enter the relevant trading name for quotations, deliveries, invoices, etc., and display a different logo. In the Configurations tab of your company form, you can enter certain information about your company trading names.
